result.algorithm: Use fixed/frequency-driven pair placement plus symbol inventory, then test the same rule on held-out books.
result.contradictions: Train-selected order does not generalize; fixed orders top out at 8/55 observed hits.
result.description_bits: inventory/order rule only; no paid row0 formula
result.negative_controls: holdout control p=0.6614; fixed-order random control p=0.3337
